title: Yicmakyahuw #3253
definition:
Ismachiah = "Jehovah sustains"

 1) a Levite and overseer of the offerings during the revival in the
    time of king Hezekiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ismachiah = "Jehovah sustains"

 1) a Levite and overseer of the offerings during the revival in the
    time of king Hezekiah

    NASB:  Yah has sustained, a Korahite
